UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a sovereign user reputation passport profile and dynamic hold history indicators.

address.description: The unique 42-character EVM hex address identifier.

username.description: The alphanumeric handle chosen by the sovereign user.

hideWallet.description: Indicates if the wallet address should be obscured on the leaderboard.

streak.description: Day countdown of continuous holding behavior.

connectedAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the passport was compiled.

karmaScore.description: Web3 aggregate reputation and reliability score (0-1000 range).

lastClaimedAt.description: ISO timestamp for when the last daily airdrop was claimed.

AuthChallenge.title: AuthChallenge
AuthChallenge.description: Transient cryptographic challenge message details mapped to the user address.

createdAt.description: EVM signature session generation coordinate timestamp.

/profiles/{address}.description: Individual reputation coordinates mapped by public key address.

/challenges/{address}.description: Transient validation message structures for cryptographic verify flows.
